summary: Commercial Operations Closeout Pack testing completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Admin pages verified: Business Pricing Admin, Numbering Rules, Launch QA Checklist. Customer Client Profile page working. Two frontend components created but NOT integrated on homepage.

integration_issues.issue: Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/public/HomeBusinessSolutionsSection.jsx but is NOT imported or used in HomepageV2Content.jsx - needs to be added to homepage
Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/admin/RuntimeStatusCard.jsx but is NOT imported or used anywhere in admin pages - needs integration point

business_pricing_admin_page.notes: Page loads correctly. Shows 2 pending requests with stats cards (Total, Pending, Contacted, Qualified, Converted, Declined). Status filter dropdown works. Action buttons (Mark Contacted, Qualify, Decline) are present.

numbering_rules_page.notes: Page loads correctly. Shows Create/Update Rule form with Entity Type, Entity Code, Format String, AlphaNum Length fields. Auto Generate and Allow Manual Input checkboxes work. Configured Rules section shows 6 rules (Invoice, Order, Quote, Service Request, SKU, Test Entity).

launch_qa_checklist_page.notes: Page loads correctly. Shows Progress tracker (0/15 checked, 0% complete). All 15 checklist items are displayed and clickable.

client_profile_page.notes: Page loads correctly. Form displays all fields: Company Name, Buying As, Order Frequency, Main Interest, Monthly Budget Range, Categories of Interest, Preferred Contact Method, Urgent Need, Multi-location buying, Needs contract pricing, Needs recurring support. Save Profile button works.

runtime_settings_api.notes: Returns integration status for resend_configured, kwikpay_configured, stripe_configured, mongo_configured. mongo_configured is true.

welcome_rewards_api_capture.notes: New users get 1000 welcome points. Returns is_new_user=true, reward_type=welcome_points, points_amount=1000.

welcome_rewards_api_check.notes: Returns eligibility status for welcome reward.

client_profile_api_get.notes: Requires authentication. Returns profile data if exists, null if not.

client_profile_api_post.notes: Creates or updates client profile. Persists all fields correctly.

business_pricing_admin_api_list.notes: Returns list of requests. Supports status filter.

business_pricing_admin_api_stats.notes: Returns counts: total, pending, contacted, qualified, converted, declined.

qa_seed_api_status.notes: Returns numbering_rules_configured, points_rules_configured, products_count, services_count, ready_for_qa.

qa_seed_api_full_launch.notes: Initializes seed data for QA testing.

action_items: MEDIUM: Import and add HomeBusinessSolutionsSection component to HomepageV2Content.jsx (component exists but not integrated)
LOW: Integrate RuntimeStatusCard component somewhere in admin dashboard or settings (component exists but not used)
critical_code_review_comments: HomeBusinessSolutionsSection.jsx created at correct path with proper data-testid but NOT imported in homepage - needs import and placement in HomepageV2Content.jsx
RuntimeStatusCard.jsx created but not imported anywhere - needs integration point (could be in admin dashboard or launch readiness page)
All backend routes correctly registered in server.py (numbering_rules_router, client_profile_router, welcome_rewards_router, runtime_settings_router, qa_seed_router, business_pricing_admin_router)
Route order for business_pricing_admin_routes.py is correct - /stats/summary defined before /{request_id} to avoid route conflict

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all admin pages work, 2 components not integrated)

seed_data_creation: Client profile created with TEST_Company_CloseoutPack for demo.customer@konekt.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commercial Operations Closeout Pack APIs all functional. Admin pages working: /admin/business-pricing-requests (2 pending requests), /admin/numbering-rules (6 configured rules), /admin/launch-qa (15 checklist items). Customer profile at /dashboard/profile/business. Two components (HomeBusinessSolutionsSection, RuntimeStatusCard) created but need frontend integration.
